scope.purpose: Verify the shared React/Vite Matrix visual runtime before it is used by the full user/admin redesign phases.

module-checks.check-4: Chrome/Playwright screenshot audit: /login user shell desktop 1440x900, 390x844, and reduced-motion.
module-checks.check-5: Chrome/Playwright screenshot audit: admin /login shell desktop 1440x900, 390x844, and reduced-motion.
module-checks.check-6: git diff --name-only -- install.sh deploy nginx docker-compose.yml

scenarios.scenario-1: Matrix canvas renders nonblank behind user and admin content without intercepting clicks, keyboard focus, text selection, or mobile scroll.
scenarios.scenario-2: VisualShell keeps content in a higher readable layer while the canvas and CRT overlays remain pointer-events-none.
scenarios.scenario-3: Resize recomputes canvas dimensions and drop columns without accumulating duplicate listeners or animation loops.
scenarios.scenario-4: Reduced-motion mode renders a static readable Matrix frame and suppresses requestAnimationFrame loops.
scenarios.scenario-5: Canvas 2D context is unavailable; runtime logs a controlled fallback marker and the app remains usable.
scenarios.scenario-6: Route navigation and component unmount cancel animation frames, timers, and listeners.

evidence-levels.module-local: Static smoke inspects source contracts, exported components, cleanup paths, reduced-motion branches, and protected imports.
evidence-levels.wave-level: User and admin frontend builds prove shared runtime integration across both apps.
evidence-levels.phase-level: Screenshot/pixel checks prove nonblank canvas, readable content, and reduced-motion behavior on desktop and mobile.

redaction.rule-1: Do not log user emails, access tokens, proxy secrets, tg links, VPN config contents, admin tokens, raw IP history, or screenshot binary data.
redaction.rule-2: Allowed telemetry: viewport dimensions, runtime branch, canvas support state, reduced-motion state, and animation lifecycle state.

autonomous-execution-safety.allowed: Implement frontend-only runtime, shell mounts, and smoke checks inside M-070 boundaries.
autonomous-execution-safety.blocked: Changing backend APIs, auth state, billing, VPN, MTProto provisioning, deploy/install scripts, nginx, docker-compose, or production runtime topology.
autonomous-execution-safety.handoff-trigger: Stop and report if screenshot checks show blank canvas, unreadable content, input interception, or reduced-motion failure.

acceptance.target-1: User and admin frontend builds pass.
acceptance.target-2: Phase-52 smoke passes with runtime lifecycle, protected surface, and redaction checks.
acceptance.target-3: Canvas nonblank and reduced-motion screenshot checks pass on mobile and desktop.
acceptance.target-4: No protected deploy/install/runtime surface changes are present.

local-2026-06-03.command-4: Chrome headless screenshot audit for user/admin /login at 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, 1440x900, plus --force-prefers-reduced-motion=reduce at 390x844.
local-2026-06-03.protected-surface: No install.sh, deploy, nginx, docker-compose, or runtime topology diff.
